The '''Combat Moon''' was a [[Moon/Legends|moon]] of [[Rabaan]] where a single [[Rabaanite]] engaged a single [[S'krrr (species)|Sk'rrr]] in combat to settle conflicts between the two peoples.

{{Moon-stub}}
